productDisplayName: Clarks Women Aerial Flower Black Heels
description: For a touch of subtle sophistication, this pair of block heels from clarks are the right choice. Styled in a rich tone, classic cut and a surprising ruffle embellishment on the front, this shoe nails all of this season's hottest trends. These shoes are the foundation of a chic city wardrobe. Wear this with understated dressy ensembles. Heel: 2.5" Upper Leather upper with a pointed toe box and ruffles on the front Slip-on style for ease of wear Padded synthetic leather footbed Outsole TPR outsole with block heels and terraced grooves on the midfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
